venue_note: MEXC Spot V3 WebSocket persistent capture pipeline (ws -> candles -> db_writer -> candles_1m)
source_detail: Real-time MEXC aggregated deals via protobuf-decoded WS, aggregated to 1m OHLCV by cdb_candles, persisted by cdb_db_writer. Exported from public.candles_1m via cdb_readonly for #3091.
db_query: SELECT symbol, ts_ms, open, high, low, close, volume, trade_count, regime_id FROM candles_1m WHERE symbol='BTCUSDT' AND ts_ms >= 1780753380000 AND ts_ms <= 1780963080000 ORDER BY ts_ms ASC
fingerprint_method: sha256(ts_ms|open|high|low|close|volume|trade_count per row, ordered by ts_ms ASC)

provenance.provenance_note: All candles originate from the MEXC WS persistent capture pipeline. No bulk backfill was used for this window. File export executed 2026-06-12 as readonly SELECT via cdb_readonly.

warning: Dataset readiness only. NOT natural_paper_evidence. Cannot satisfy §5.2.4 without a natural paper campaign evidence chain (SIGNAL -> DECISION -> ORDER -> FILL).
evidence_class_note: Dataset input is controlled_lab_evidence. Upgrades to natural_paper_evidence only after a successful campaign produces SIGNAL->DECISION->ORDER->FILL chain.
board_stage_note: Board stage is orthogonal to LR. Does not authorize live trading.

replay_compatibility.candle_series_validation: PASS (no gaps, strict 1m cadence, all required fields present)

campaign_suitability.note: This window supports up to 7 full 8h campaign slots at 100% data quality.
